CustomField.description: Stores the currency code for the event amount (for multi-currency orgs). [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The ISO currency code is auto-derived from the related record.
CustomField.label: Currency
